heading: Repealed. ,May 29, 1928, ch. 901, § 145 Stat. 995
label: 116 Repealed. ,May 29, 1928, ch. 901, § 145 Stat. 995
notes: Section, R.S. § 72, related to accounting by the Secretaries, Clerks, Sergeant at Arms, Postmasters, and Doorkeepers of Senate and House for property of the Government in their possession.
